case_title: BINGHAM, SCOTT VS HOLDEN, LYNNANNE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BINGHAM, SCOTT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOLDEN, LYNNANNE HOLDEN, ANDREW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,093.00 FILED BY BINGHAM, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, LYNNANNE HOLDEN, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,952.81 FILED BY HOLDEN, LYNNANNE HOLDEN, ANDREW AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BINGHAM, SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, ANDREW

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-21-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-04-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 OUT OF TOWN FOR BUSINESS CONFERENCE PREVIOUSLY PLANNED. REQUIRED TO CO-CHAIR AT CONFERENCE AND CANNOT BE CANCELLED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, LYNNANNE
A SECOND PROOF OF SERVICE (SUBSTITUTED) ON DEFT'S CLAIM FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BINGHAM, SCOTT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOLDEN, LYNNANNE HOLDEN, ANDREW RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BINGHAM, SCOTT $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF BINGHAM, SCOTT
